title: gruai Social Marketing — Multi-Platform Launch (Reddit, RedNote, X)

success_looks_like: Comprehensive marketing plan covering Reddit, RedNote (小红书), X, and evaluated additional platforms
Platform-specific research with audience analysis, algorithm mechanics, and competitor mapping
Ready-to-execute content calendar with cross-platform synergy
Builds on existing strategy docs from gruai-marketing-launch
Chinese README (README.zh-CN.md) for 小红书 users clicking through to GitHub
failure_looks_like: Generic marketing advice not tailored to each platform's mechanics
Ignoring prior work from gruai-marketing-launch directive
Missing Chinese content strategy for 小红书
No concrete posting schedule or content drafts
dod.quality_bar: Each platform strategy is specific enough to execute immediately — not just 'post good content' but actual drafts, timing, hashtags, and audience targeting

output.rationale: Multi-platform marketing (Reddit, RedNote, X, etc.) with research needed for new platforms.

output.summary: No existing checkpoint found — new directive.
Created directive.md and directive.json. DOD extracted from CEO brief.
Read vision.md, prior gruai-marketing-launch strategies (Reddit launch guide, 小红书 strategy + 6 post drafts). X/Twitter NOT covered yet.
Marketing readiness audit: npm gru-ai v0.3.0 published, GitHub public, README polished, demo GIF created (1.6MB). Prior Reddit + 小红书 strategies complete. X/Twitter missing. Landing page deferred.
Strong convergence: fix foundations (done), Reddit + RedNote simultaneous, X research only, secondary platforms go/no-go. Phase 2 deliberation skipped.
CEO confirmed: GIF done, landing page deferred, repo renamed, Reddit + RedNote simultaneous, X research only.
output.verified_intent: Execute Reddit + RedNote marketing simultaneously using existing strategy docs. Research X/Twitter strategy (no execution yet). Evaluate HN/ProductHunt with go/no-go only. Landing page deferred.

output.summary: 4 independent projects: Reddit execution [P0], RedNote execution + Chinese README [P0], X research [P1], Secondary platforms go/no-go [P1]. Taylor builds all, Priya reviews all.

CEO approved with one addition: Chinese README (README.zh-CN.md) added to RedNote project scope. CEO also corrected risk framing — this is open source community sharing, not a hard launch. No 'burned first impressions' concern.
CTO decomposed 4 projects into 11 total tasks: Reddit (2 tasks), RedNote (4 tasks incl Chinese README), X research (3 tasks), Secondary platforms (1 task). All validated.
Branch directive/gruai-social-marketing created. No worktree needed.

modifications: Added Chinese README (README.zh-CN.md) to rednote-launch-execution scope
Removed 'burned first impressions' risk framing — open source sharing, not hard launch
